message:
feat(cli): add LIKE fallback when FTS tables are unavailable in robot search

build_search now catches FTS query failures and automatically degrades
to a LIKE-based SQL search for runtime databases that intentionally
lack FTS tables. Includes:

- extract_like_terms() for proper term extraction from search queries
- LIKE escaping to handle special characters in search terms
- Snippet generation via substr() instead of FTS snippet() function
- Graceful fallback path that preserves the same result structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
